summary.intent: Fix silent truncation of AGENTS.md and TOOLS.md in moltis by making the limit configurable, raising the default, adding warn logging, and surfacing truncation metadata in the full_context API response.
summary.outcome: All five files were modified, tests pass, PR #610 was created, and a follow-up commit addressed a Greptile code review comment about a duplicated magic constant.

repo: WORKSPACE_FILE_MAX_CHARS was hardcoded at 6,000 in crates/agents/src/prompt.rs — silently truncating workspace files with no operator-visible feedback
SOUL.md has no truncation limit, making the old behavior inconsistent across workspace files
Config schema changes require updates in three files: schema.rs (struct field + default fn), validate.rs (build_schema_map leaf entry), and template.rs (commented example line)
tracing is a regular (non-feature-gated) dependency in moltis-agents crate
llama-cpp-sys-2 has a pre-existing cmake/CUDA build failure that causes clippy to fail globally; scoped clippy runs on individual crates are needed to validate changes
PromptRuntimeContext does not derive Default — all struct literal constructions must be updated explicitly when fields are added
ChatConfig is publicly re-exported from moltis_config, so downstream crates can use ChatConfig::default().workspace_file_max_chars as a canonical fallback

code.finding: Old WORKSPACE_FILE_MAX_CHARS const (6000) replaced with DEFAULT_WORKSPACE_FILE_MAX_CHARS (50000); limit is now read from PromptRuntimeContext.workspace_file_max_chars
append_truncated_text_block gained a label parameter and emits tracing::warn! with file name, original_chars, and limit when truncation occurs
full_context() response now includes a workspaceFiles array with per-file truncation metadata (file, chars, limit, truncated)

workflow: Running cargo clippy on the full workspace fails due to unrelated native build deps; use --package flags to lint only affected crates
After adding a field to a struct without Default, a replace_all edit is the efficient way to update all test construction sites at once
Greptile bot reviews PRs automatically; its comment about duplicated magic constants was valid and addressed in a follow-up commit

friction: Global clippy run unusable due to pre-existing llama-cpp-sys-2 cmake failure — had to fall back to per-crate clippy invocations
PromptRuntimeContext lacking Default meant 12 test construction sites needed manual updating when adding the new field
open_items: Web UI indicator on Settings > Agent page showing AGENTS.md/TOOLS.md size and truncation status (requires JS changes in page-agents.js and new RPC endpoint)
Dynamic limit scaling based on model context window size (requires model resolution before prompt construction, changing call order)
